definition.summary: Shrink a volume's preallocated .dat file down to its actual used size.
definition.description: Wraps the new VolumeShrinkPreallocated RPC (commit 84563ea7f). Useful after retention cleanup or when a volume was over-allocated. Volume must be read-only and not currently being written.

params.name: min_savings_bytes
params.doc: Skip shrink unless we'd reclaim at least this much (default 1GiB)

preconditions.doc: Only meaningful for sparsely-filled preallocated volumes
